description: "Back to School News" is an engaging email template designed to keep parents informed about school activities and educational updates. Ideal for educational institutions, this template enables efficient communication about back to school preparations, academic calendars, and curriculum updates. It is a part of the Education and Newsletter categories, making it perfect for circulating monthly or weekly newsletters. The template has been thoughtfully designed to include sections for parent communications, ensuring that all essential information is shared effectively. With its user-friendly layout and education-focused content, it serves as a valuable tactic for fostering a strong school-parent partnership.
short_description: Get ready for the school year with our education-focused newsletter template. Perfect for back-to-school updates, parent communications, and sharing essential school details. Ideal for educators and administrators. Streamline academic year preparation with this engaging template.

designer.description: I am a web and graphic designer deeply fascinated by UI/UX. Constantly upgrading my skills, I strive to create visually stunning and user-friendly designs and digital experiences that leave a lasting impact.

html_data:
Time to go back to school!

Tips and advices on how to make the best out of this period, prepared by professionals. Wether your kid is going back to school or just starting this year, these tips will help you give them a better experience during this quite stressful time for them.

Read the blog
 

Start the early bedtime routine

Summer holidays are usually accompanied with late nights of games, movies, or even traveling. Use at least two weeks to prepare them for an earlier bed time routine so their mornings won't be all lazy and slow.

 

Familiarize them with the environment

It is really important for our community that our students are mentally prepared for the school year. Taking this into consideration, our school will be opened two weeks prior for any visits from our new and returning students & parents.

 

Talk about expectations

As important as familiarizing with the environment is familiarizing with struggles and common obstacles kids have at school. Ask them about their concerns and give them as much of a realistic answer as possible. If needed, contact our school for professional help.

 

Head over to our school blog for more tips and articles on how you can help your kids on this journey!

Read more articles

Messages from our Fifth Graders

Leo Wright

"Art classes are my favorites. We have all kinds of tools to create with, and this helps me express my ideas better"

Anna Smith

"I am a Biology lover, and our school always has the best ways to teach us about every living creature known"

Daphne Ryles

"I want to be a football player, and my school contributes to my dream everyday with so much love and dedication"

 

Can't wait to see everyone in class!

Until then, have fun, enjoy your vacations, and get ready to rock this new school year!

Teachers of Bee High
